name: zeb/d3
description: D3.js v7 runtime for RWE templates. Full d3 namespace bundled offline. Bar, line, pie chart helpers with reactive stateKey bridge.

full-7.x.note: Full d3 v7 bundle via esbuild. Build: cd /tmp/zeb-d3-build && npm install && node_modules/.bin/esbuild entry.mjs --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=d3.bundle.mjs
